title: Government response to the House of Lords food and health report
body: "On 24 October 2024, the House of Lords Food, Diet and Obesity Committee published its report Recipe for health: a plan to fix our broken food system.  The committee explored ways to improve the food system, to support people have better diets, achieve a healthier weight and live longer healthier lives.  This is the government’s response to the committee’s recommendations. "

taxons.title: Health, safety and wellbeing in schools
